label: Tillverkning av gummi- och plastvaror
description: Scaffold för tillverkare av gummi- och plastvaror med fokus på produktionskapacitet, material/processer, branschlösningar och tydlig offert-/kontaktväg för B2B-kunder.
primaryJobs: bygga förtroende genom kvalitet, referenser och arbetssätt

routes.purpose: Positionera företaget, förklara vad som tillverkas och leda besökaren till kontakt eller offertförfrågan.
Visa produktområden, komponenttyper och exempel på vad företaget tillverkar.
Beskriva material, processer, kapacitet och arbetssätt så att inköpare och tekniska beställare kan bedöma lämplighet.
Bygga förtroende med företagspresentation, team, arbetsmetod och relevanta kundreferenser.
Få in kontakt- och offertförfrågningar via formulär, telefon, e-post och adress.

routes.when: när företaget vill visa lösningar för flera kundsegment som fordon, bygg, medicinteknik, industri eller förpackning
när underlag finns för att beskriva kvalitetssäkring, spårbarhet, provning eller dokumenterade arbetssätt utan att lova certifieringar som inte kan styrkas

sectionOrderRules: Hero must state what kinds of rubber or plastic products the company manufactures and include a primary CTA.
Product summary should describe concrete product categories or component types, not vague claims.
Manufacturing summary must appear before the final CTA and should mention relevant materials, methods or production capabilities when available.
Trust proof should use real references, visible company details or documented experience and must not invent certifications or volumes.
Sections should distinguish products, processes and applications so the same message is not repeated.
Products intro must connect the company offering to actual manufactured items or component families.
Product list items must be concrete, such as seals, hoses, molded parts, profiles, packaging details or custom plastic components when supported by the dossier.
If pricing-table is used, it should present indicative structures or request-based pricing only when honest for the business.
A CTA to technical dialogue or quote request should follow the product list.
Manufacturing intro must explain how the company works from requirement to finished part or delivery.
Materials and processes should name actual materials or methods only when supported by the input.
Quality workflow must describe real checks, tolerances, testing, traceability or documentation practices if available, without implying formal certification unless provided.
This page should help a buyer evaluate fit, so process details should be more specific than the home page.
About story must be specific about the company, its production focus or customer collaboration, not generic branding copy.
Team should highlight relevant roles such as production, sales or technical support when data exists.
Trust proof may include references, organization number visibility and business facts, but must stay factual.
Contact page must provide real phone, email and address details when supplied.
Contact form should support quote or inquiry intent and allow the visitor to describe need, volume, drawing or material request in plain language.
Map and opening hours are optional enhancements and should appear after the core contact options.

mustPass: Have a clear B2B manufacturing angle rather than a generic local service layout.
Make products and manufacturing/process capability first-class content surfaces.
Provide a direct route to contact or quote request on home, product and manufacturing pages.
Use factual trust signals only, such as references, company details and documented working methods.
Support both standard product presentation and custom manufacturing inquiries.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Generic service-business wording that hides what is actually manufactured.
Invented certifications, machine park details, tolerances, production volumes or customer logos.
Restaurant, portfolio, booking or consumer retail route patterns that do not match industrial manufacturing.
Overpromising exact lead times or capabilities without source support.

compatibleDossiers.comment: Kandidat-rekommendationer härledda ur branschprofilen; verifiera mot riktiga Dossier-id före promotion.

selectionProfile.embeddingText: Industriscaffold för SNI 22 tillverkning av gummi- och plastvaror. B2B-fokus med startsida, produkter, tillverkning/processer, om oss och kontakt. Sektioner för produktöversikt, material och processer, kvalitetsarbete, referenser, team, formulär, karta och FAQ. Passar företag som tillverkar plast- eller gummikomponenter, profiler, formgods, detaljer eller kundanpassade industriprodukter.
llmClassificationHints: Choose this scaffold when the business manufactures rubber or plastic products, components or custom industrial parts.
Prefer this scaffold over a generic service scaffold when process capability, materials and product categories are central to the buying decision.
Suitable for companies selling to other businesses where quote requests and technical dialogue matter more than consumer checkout.

variants.label: Draft Default
variants.description: Startvariant kopierad från referens-scaffoldens default så kandidaten kan förhandsgranskas; ersätts vid kurering.
